zh.lifeSummary: 當Amnelia Barnett於1483年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦坎維爾時，她的父親Robert William Hodson Barnett23歲，母親Jane Grace23歲。她於大約1503年與Thomas Castell結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1513年在英國坎布利其爾易亞斯特 哈特利享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amnelia Barnett于1483年出生在英国英格兰倫敦坎維爾时，她的父亲Robert William Hodson Barnett23岁，母亲Jane Grace23岁。她于大约1503年与Thomas Castell结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1513年在英国坎布利其爾易亞斯特 哈特利享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barnett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from various places, for example Chipping (High) Barnet, East Barnet, and Friern Barnet in Greater London, named with Old English bærnet ‘place cleared by burning’ (a derivative of bærnan ‘to burn, to set light to’).
English (of Norman origin): from a medieval personal name, a variant of   Bernard  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): this surname has been adopted by Ashkenazic Jews in the English-speaking world, perhaps as an Anglicized form of a vaguely similar Jewish name such as   Baruch  .

variants.name: Bernard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Marcel, Pierre, Andre, Lucien, Normand, Henri, Michel, Cecile, Gabrielle.

English, Scottish, French, Walloon, Breton, Dutch, German, Polish, Czech, Slovenian, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and African (mainly Tanzania): from the personal name Bernard, from an ancient Germanic name, composed of the elements ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’ (see Bernhard ). It was borne by several Christian saints, including Saint Bernard of Menthon (923–1008), founder of Alpine hospices and patron saint of mountaineers, whose cult accounts for the frequency of the name in Alpine regions. The popularity of the personal name was also greatly increased by virtue of its having been borne by Saint Bernard of Clairvaux (c. 1090–1153), founder and abbot of the Cistercian monastery at Clairvaux. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Bernardo . Bernard is the second most frequent surname in France. Compare Barnard , Benore , and Burnor .

History: The first documented bearer of this name in Canada was from the Lorraine region of France. He is recorded in Quebec City, QC, in 1666 as Jean Bernard. He and some of his descendants were dit Anse or Hanse, presumably because his original forename was Hans (German equivalent of French Jean). — The Bernard families of LA have origins in France, Acadia, the West Indies, and Germany. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

nameMeanings.name: Amnelia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A blend of two medieval names: Emilia (which is of Latin origin: see Emily ) and the Latinized Germanic Amalia . Henry Fielding is sometimes credited with having coined it for the heroine of his novel Amelia ( 1751 ), but forms such as Meelia, Amaly and Aemelia occur from the 17th century onwards.

en.lifeSummary: When Amnelia Barnett was born in 1483, in Camberwell, London, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert William Hodson Barnett, was 23 and her mother, Jane Grace, was 23. She married Thomas Castell about 1503. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1513, in East Hatley, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amnelia Barnett est née en 1483, à Camberwell, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert William Hodson Barnett, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Jane Grace, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Castell environ 1503. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1513, à East Hatley, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amnelia Barnett 1483 in Camberwell, London, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert William Hodson Barnett 23 und ihre Mutter Jane Grace 23. Sie hat um 1503 Thomas Castell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1513 im Alter von 30 Jahren in East Hatley, Cambridgeshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amnelia Barnett è nata il nel 1483 nel Camberwell, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert William Hodson Barnett, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Jane Grace, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Castell circa 1503. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1513, nel East Hatley, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 30 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Amnelia Barnett(이)가 1483년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 캄버웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert William Hodson Barnett(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Grace(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1503년 Thomas Castell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1513년 영국 캄브리지실르 이스트 하틀리에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amnelia Barnett nasceu em 1483, em Camberwell, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert William Hodson Barnett, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Jane Grace, tinha 23 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amnelia Barnett родилась в 1483 г. в местности камбирвелл, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert William Hodson Barnett было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Grace, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Castell около 1503 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1513 г. в местности эаст хатли, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет.
